title: Ghajinikanth
desc: Rajnikanth, a man suffering from selective amnesia, meets the woman of his dreams and attempts to hide his condition from her.

title: Romeo
desc: Arivu desires a real love connection but ends up with Leela, who marries him out of family obligation. However, despite their differences, he tries his best to win her over.

title: Ethir Neechal
desc: When a man's deception about his real name is revealed, he is compelled to join a marathon to prove himself to his lover.

title: Velaikkaran
desc: Arivazhagan, a slum dweller, works in a large food company. However, when he realises that they adulterate the food, he strives to fight them.

title: Imaikkaa Nodigal
desc: Anjali Vikramadithyan, a CBI officer, sets out to track down a serial killer who the police claim to have killed years ago. However, the investigation becomes personal when he targets her family.

title: Cadaver
desc: When two surgeons mysteriously get murdered by Vetri, a prisoner, the responsibility of locating his accomplice falls on the shoulders of a pathologist.

title: Supreme
desc: A charitable trust faces threats from a powerful mafia leader who has set his eyes on its land. He plans to kill the legal heir to grab the wealth, but a brave taxi driver becomes an impediment.

title: Super Hit Songs
desc: A comprehensive compilation of the greatest super hit songs is played back to back in order to entertain and enthrall the audience.

title: Nagaram Marupakkam
desc: Selvam, a criminal seeking a fresh start in Hyderabad, falls for a dancer. Just as they plan their future, unresolved events from his past resurface, threatening his new life.

title: Super Hit Songs
desc: A comprehensive compilation of the greatest super hit songs is played back to back in order to entertain and enthrall the audience.

title: Super Hit Songs
desc: A comprehensive compilation of the greatest super hit songs is played back to back in order to entertain and enthrall the audience.

title: Inttelligent
desc: A successful software engineer becomes a vigilante following the demise of his mentor in a bid to seek revenge against those responsible for the latter's death.

title: Saravanan Irukka Bayamaen
desc: Saravanan, a lackadaisical young man, stumbles into power as the local political head. Subsequently, armed with clueless confidence, he uses his new role to impress the girl of his dreams.

title: Raatchasi
desc: Lieutenant Colonel Geetha Rani implements different plans to reform an undisciplined government school. However, she faces numerous challenges in her way, including a corrupt MLA.

title: Raid
desc: Inspector Prabhakaran takes an oath to eradicate criminals. However, chaos ensues when his fiance gets killed in a crossfire.

title: Bhimaa
desc: After some mysterious instances at a temple of historical significance, a detective visits the region to investigate and find out the truth behind the incidents.

title: Parking
desc: A parking spot frays the relationship between two neighbours of different generations and world views. Soon, the two men find themselves in an escalating battle to have the space all to themselves.
